filter_pushdown.note: lineitem sorted ASC by l_shipdate; zone map enables early-termination break once block_min > 10471

group_key_encoding.note: Load dicts at runtime; use int16_t codes directly as array indices; decode only at output

data_structures.aggregation: flat_array[6] of struct{sum_qty, sum_price, sum_disc_price, sum_charge, sum_disc, count, cnt} — one per thread (thread-local), merged after parallel phase; indexed by (rf_code * 2 + ls_code)

parallelism.morsel_size_rationale: L3=44MB / 64 threads / 7 cols × ~40 bytes/row ≈ 16K rows fits per-thread working set in L3 slice
parallelism.note: Each thread owns a private flat array[6] of accumulators — zero contention during hot scan loop. Merge is sequential after all threads complete.

index_usage.detail: Iterate blocks; break immediately when blocks[b].mn > 10471 (sorted ASC guarantees all remaining blocks also fail). Skips ~150 of 600 blocks = ~15M rows, ~25% I/O reduction.

scan_detail.pass_description: One fused loop per morsel: load l_shipdate, check <= 10471 via SIMD AVX-512 comparison (16 int32 per instruction), for passing rows load (rf, ls, qty, price, disc, tax) and accumulate directly into thread-local flat array[6]
scan_detail.simd: AVX-512 on l_shipdate filter; compiler auto-vectorized accumulation with #pragma omp simd on the accumulation loop
scan_detail.branch_avoidance: branchless mask-based accumulation after SIMD filter step

memory_detail.total_effective_io: ~1.8 GB (75% of 2.4 GB across 7 columns after zone map pruning)
memory_detail.mmap_strategy: mmap all 7 column files + zone map at startup; OS prefetcher handles sequential access
memory_detail.accumulator_footprint: 6 slots × 7 doubles × 64 threads = ~21 KB — fits in L1 cache per thread

output.post_aggregation: sort 4 result rows by (decoded l_returnflag string, decoded l_linestatus string) — trivial sort on 4 elements
output.avg_finalization: compute AVG(x) = sum_x / count at output stage; no intermediate AVG state needed

estimated_cost.bottleneck: memory bandwidth across 7 column files (~1.8 GB effective read shared across 64 threads)
estimated_cost.note: Estimate consistent with observed GenDB 41ms. Flat-array aggregation with 6 slots eliminates all hash overhead. Early-termination zone map reduces I/O ~25%.
